description: Ubico is an AI sales engagement platform that finds leads and runs personalized multichannel outreach from a unified inbox.
overview: Ubico helps small and mid-sized sales teams find leads, personalize multichannel outreach, and manage conversations from a unified inbox using AI.
what_is: Ubico is an AI-powered sales engagement platform built for industries like logistics and manufacturing. It helps teams find, engage, and convert leads with personalized, data-driven outreach, turning operational data into new opportunities without extra headcount.

It is strongest for multichannel outreach, prospecting, and managing conversations from a unified inbox. Ubico integrates with major CRMs like HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, and Zoho plus systems like ERPs, focused on targeted sales engagement rather than full marketing automation.
